summary: Credit System and SmugMug-style Pricing testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend PhotographerSessionsManager UI verified with pricing card showing buy-in, per-photo, photos included, hourly rate and pricing modal with all input fields and platform fee info.

Backend APIs - Pricing.GET /api/photographer/{id}/pricing: PASS - Returns SmugMug-style pricing (live_buyin_price, live_photo_price, photo_package_size, booking_hourly_rate, booking_min_hours)
Backend APIs - Pricing.PUT /api/photographer/{id}/pricing: PASS - Updates pricing settings with validation (rejects negative values)
Backend APIs - Pricing.Partial updates: PASS - Can update single pricing field without affecting others

Backend APIs - Credits.GET /api/credits/balance/{user_id}: PASS - Returns credit balance with currency='credits' and note '1 credit = $1'
Backend APIs - Credits.GET /api/credits/history/{user_id}: PASS - Returns transaction history with limit and type filters
Backend APIs - Credits.GET /api/credits/summary/{user_id}: PASS - Returns current_balance, total_earned, total_spent, breakdown

Backend APIs - Credit System Logic.Transaction logging: CreditTransaction model records all credit movements

Frontend - Pricing Modal.Buy-in Price input: PASS - Editable number field with value 25
Frontend - Pricing Modal.Price per Photo input: PASS - Editable number field with value 5
Frontend - Pricing Modal.Photos Included input: PASS - Editable number field with value 0
Frontend - Pricing Modal.Hourly Rate input: PASS - Editable number field with value 50
Frontend - Pricing Modal.Minimum Hours input: PASS - Editable number field with value 1
Frontend - Pricing Modal.Platform fee info: PASS - Shows '20% is deducted from each transaction. You receive 80% of all payments.'

test_steps_executed: 2. Ran pytest - 15/15 passed covering pricing GET/PUT, credit balance/history/summary APIs
3. Frontend: Injected photographer auth via localStorage
5. Frontend: Verified Pricing Settings card with all 4 pricing fields
6. Frontend: Verified Pricing Modal with all inputs and platform fee info
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit system and SmugMug-style pricing fully working. Pricing stored on Profile model. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_credits_pricing_system.py covers pricing and credit APIs. Frontend route is /photographer/sessions. Photo Tools menu only shows for photographer roles. Platform fee is 20% - photographers receive 80%.
